facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this rooftop. Their loss. INK 360 sits above InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort and the view from up there hits different at golden hour. 4.5 stars across 518 reviews. Not a fluke. Price range runs $40-80 per person, so budget accordingly and order something worth the climb. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sun drop into the South China Sea from INK 360 rooftop. InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort. 4.5 stars. 518 people already know. Now you do too.
